response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development and demonstrates expertise in multiple languages and frameworks, including C++ (used at National Instruments). However, his recent focus has been primarily on web, mobile, and embedded systems with languages like TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, lacking recent C++ specialization or cloud/IoT industrial automation experience. His resume also does not highlight secure engineering practices or IEC 62443 compliance.
strengths: Strong C++ experience from National Instruments role, including low-level development.
Proven track record in high-performance, scalable systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby).
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly across diverse domains.
concerns: Limited recent C++ development experience; primary focus has shifted to other languages/frameworks.
No explicit mention of IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle practices.
Lacks direct experience with industrial automation protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA) or cloud platforms (Azure).
